AllocatorImplementation.notes: Fixed: #2890 u64 bitmask overflow resolved by CheckMask (e80ee2092)

BPConProof.expected_mismatch_reason: Both TLC and TLA2 timeout. TLC timed out at 600s. Genuinely intractable state space.

CarTalkPuzzle_M3.expected_mismatch_reason: TLA2 completes in ~13h via sorted-partition + fold-cache optimizations; TLC times out after 60+ min in our testing.
CarTalkPuzzle_M3.notes: N=121, P=5. Answer: {<<1, 3, 9, 27, 81>>} (powers of 3, balanced ternary). TLA2 optimizations: (1) sorted integer partition generator reduces Break from 121^5=25.9B to 80,631, (2) recursive fold memoization cache, (3) Seq fast-path in fold applicator. TLC timed out at 60min default; may complete given sufficient time (25.9B function evaluations).

EWD687a_anim.expected_mismatch_reason: Both TLC and TLA2 timeout. TLC timed out at 1000.0s. Genuinely intractable state space.
EWD687a_anim.notes: Animation spec with SVG/IOUtils. 6 model value constants, PROPERTY DT2, ACTION_CONSTRAINT. TLC ran 16+ min using 3.3GB RAM without completing. Both tools timeout.

tla2.note: Works correctly: 152K states at depth 10 in 19s (release). State space too large for completion.

EWD840_anim.expected_mismatch_reason: Intractable state space (~1.9B potential states). N=9 with history variable and WF fairness. Both TLC and TLA2 timeout. Spec designed for simulation mode, not exhaustive BFS.
EWD840_anim.notes: Animation spec with SVG output. N=9, SPECIFICATION with fairness. TLC ran 20+ min using 5.5GB RAM without completing. Both TLA2 and TLC timeout.

EWD998.expected_mismatch_reason: 219M distinct states at N=4. TLC itself takes 50+ min. Both TLC and TLA2 timeout. EWD998Small (N=3) passes with exact match.

EWD998Chan.expected_mismatch_reason: N=3 requires ~15 min on TLC. Both TLC and TLA2 timeout. Smaller variants pass.

EWD998ChanID_export.notes: Simulation-only spec. Requires --simulate mode (#3312). TLC passes with -simulate (3s). TLA2 release diagnose now matches by successful simulation completion; state-count parity is intentionally ignored for simulation mode. Baseline refreshed 2026-03-17.

EWD998ChanID_shiviz.notes: Simulation-only spec. Requires --simulate mode (#3312). TLC passes with -simulate (3s). TLA2 release diagnose now matches by successful simulation completion; state-count parity is intentionally ignored for simulation mode. Baseline refreshed 2026-03-17.

Einstein.notes: Constraint-satisfaction puzzle. TLC enumerates 134M+ permutations as initial states; FindSolution invariant halts when solution found. Invariant violation is expected/correct.

ElevatorLivenessLarge.expected_mismatch_reason: 3-floor elevator with 2 leads-to properties + 8 fairness conditions. TLC also times out at 600s. ElevatorLivenessMedium passes with exact match (4,122 states).

ElevatorSafetyLarge.expected_mismatch_reason: 3-floor elevator safety, TLC also times out at 600s. Medium variant passes.

EnvironmentController.expected_mismatch_reason: Both TLC and TLA2 timeout. TLC timed out at 600s. Genuinely intractable state space.

Huang.category_override_reason: Post-CG-removal (#3354): 10 WF/SF constraints, 81K ENABLED evals exceed 120s medium timeout (285s measured, #3714)

MCCRDT.expected_mismatch_reason: Requires -Dtlc2.tool.impl.Tool.cdot=true (experimental action composition). ASSUME fails without flag. Both tools correctly detect assume_violation. TLA2 status encoding differs (pass vs fail).

MCKVSSafetyLarge.expected_mismatch_reason: ~3 billion estimated states. TLC also times out at 600s. MCKVSSafetySmall passes with exact match.

MCKVSSafetyMedium.expected_mismatch_reason: Large KVS model, TLC also times out at 600s. Smaller variants pass.
